headlines.title: Germany Plans $1.7 Billion Strategic Natural Gas Reserve
headlines.summary: Germany is moving to create a state-owned strategic emergency reserve of natural gas to boost its energy security, the Economy Ministry of Europe’s biggest economy said on Tuesday.
